La Trappeza Bar & Restaurant

Food with soul in the heart of Turre

schedule Summer 12:00 - 20:00 · Winter 12:00 - 22:30

Our Story

We are a couple passionate about food, dedicated to creating a place where every meal feels like home. At La Trappeza, we combine the warmth of family hospitality with fresh ingredients and recipes that tell a story.

Our corner in Turre is designed for you to relax, enjoy good company and savour the Mediterranean, always with a smile and an excellent selection of drinks.

pets Dog friendly

favorite Family service
